name: Enamine_search_catalog
description: Search Enamine compound catalog by keyword or name. Enamine is a leading supplier with 37B+ make-on-demand compounds (REAL database), 300K+ building blocks, and 3M+ screening compounds.

query.description: Search query - compound name or keyword

catalog.description: Catalog: REAL (make-on-demand), BB (building blocks), SCR (screening), all (default: all)

name: Enamine_get_compound
description: Get compound details by Enamine ID. Returns structure, availability, pricing, and ordering information.

name: Enamine_search_smiles
description: Search Enamine by chemical structure (SMILES). Supports exact match, substructure, and similarity search. Ideal for finding purchasable analogs of hit compounds.

smiles.description: SMILES string for the query compound

search_type.description: Search type: exact, substructure, similarity (default: similarity)

name: Enamine_get_libraries
description: Get information about available Enamine compound libraries including REAL database, building blocks, screening compounds, and specialized libraries (fragments, covalent).
